출애굽기 36:1.content: “Bezalel and Oholiab shall work with every wise-hearted man, in whom Yahweh has put wisdom and understanding to know how to do all the work for the service of the sanctuary, according to all that Yahweh has commanded.”

출애굽기 36:2.content: Moses called Bezalel and Oholiab, and every wise-hearted man, in whose heart Yahweh had put wisdom, even everyone whose heart stirred him up to come to the work to do it.

출애굽기 36:3.content: They received from Moses all the offering which the children of Israel had brought for the work of the service of the sanctuary, with which to make it. They kept bringing free will offerings to him every morning.

출애굽기 36:4.content: All the wise men, who performed all the work of the sanctuary, each came from his work which he did.

출애굽기 36:5.content: They spoke to Moses, saying, “The people have brought much more than enough for the service of the work which Yahweh commanded to make.”

출애굽기 36:6.content: Moses gave a commandment, and they caused it to be proclaimed throughout the camp, saying, “Let neither man nor woman make anything else for the offering for the sanctuary.” So the people were restrained from bringing.

출애굽기 36:7.content: For the stuff they had was sufficient to do all the work, and too much.

출애굽기 36:8.content: All the wise-hearted men among those who did the work made the tabernacle with ten curtains of fine twined linen, blue, purple, and scarlet. They made them with cherubim, the work of a skillful workman.

출애굽기 36:9.content: The length of each curtain was twenty-eight cubits, and the width of each curtain four cubits. All the curtains had one measure.

출애굽기 36:10.content: He coupled five curtains to one another, and the other five curtains he coupled to one another.

출애굽기 36:11.content: He made loops of blue on the edge of the one curtain from the edge in the coupling. Likewise he made in the edge of the curtain that was outermost in the second coupling.

출애굽기 36:12.content: He made fifty loops in the one curtain, and he made fifty loops in the edge of the curtain that was in the second coupling. The loops were opposite to one another.

출애굽기 36:13.content: He made fifty clasps of gold, and coupled the curtains to one another with the clasps: so the tabernacle was a unit.

출애굽기 36:14.content: He made curtains of goats’ hair for a covering over the tabernacle. He made them eleven curtains.

출애굽기 36:15.content: The length of each curtain was thirty cubits, and four cubits the width of each curtain. The eleven curtains had one measure.

출애굽기 36:16.content: He coupled five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves.

출애굽기 36:17.content: He made fifty loops on the edge of the curtain that was outermost in the coupling, and he made fifty loops on the edge of the curtain which was outermost in the second coupling.

출애굽기 36:18.content: He made fifty clasps of bronze to couple the tent together, that it might be a unit.

출애굽기 36:19.content: He made a covering for the tent of rams’ skins dyed red, and a covering of sea cow hides above.

출애굽기 36:20.content: He made the boards for the tabernacle of acacia wood, standing up.

출애굽기 36:21.content: Ten cubits was the length of a board, and a cubit and a half the width of each board.

출애굽기 36:22.content: Each board had two tenons, joined to one another. He made all the boards of the tabernacle this way.

출애굽기 36:23.content: He made the boards for the tabernacle, twenty boards for the south side southward.

출애굽기 36:24.content: He made forty sockets of silver under the twenty boards: two sockets under one board for its two tenons, and two sockets under another board for its two tenons.

출애굽기 36:25.content: For the second side of the tabernacle, on the north side, he made twenty boards

출애굽기 36:26.content: and their forty sockets of silver: two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.

출애굽기 36:27.content: For the far part of the tabernacle westward he made six boards.

출애굽기 36:28.content: He made two boards for the corners of the tabernacle in the far part.

출애굽기 36:29.content: They were double beneath, and in the same way they were all the way to its top to one ring. He did this to both of them in the two corners.

출애굽기 36:30.content: There were eight boards and their sockets of silver, sixteen sockets—under every board two sockets.

출애굽기 36:31.content: He made bars of acacia wood: five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,

출애굽기 36:32.content: and five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the tabernacle for the hinder part westward.

출애굽기 36:33.content: He made the middle bar to pass through in the middle of the boards from the one end to the other.

출애굽기 36:34.content: He overlaid the boards with gold, and made their rings of gold as places for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.

출애굽기 36:35.content: He made the veil of blue, purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen, with cherubim. He made it the work of a skillful workman.

출애굽기 36:36.content: He made four pillars of acacia for it, and overlaid them with gold. Their hooks were of gold. He cast four sockets of silver for them.

출애굽기 36:37.content: He made a screen for the door of the tent, of blue, purple, scarlet, and fine twined linen, the work of an embroiderer;

출애굽기 36:38.content: and the five pillars of it with their hooks. He overlaid their capitals and their fillets with gold, and their five sockets were of bronze.
